meaning: n.滴答声,记号,勾号,扁虱v.滴答地响,标以记号,作滴答声
examples: I wound up the watch and listened to it tick.
The only sound was the soft tick of the clock.
It's a mighty small tick, anyway.
Oct. 2, critics of the markets have called for a return to the up-tick rule.
Noble Laureate or not, Dr. Krugman is overlooking a core component of what makes people tick.
